task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Internal Audit - Unauthorized Access' case is opened in ARKCase.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ARKCase interface shows the case title 'Internal Audit - Unauthorized Access' at the top or in the active tab.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Documents section of the case is active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Documents' tab or section is selected and visible within the case view.

task_completion.description: Verify that the original evidence file has been uploaded to the case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'Access_Logs_2025.xlsx' is listed in the Documents section of the case.

task_completion.description: Verify that a working copy of the evidence file has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'Access_Logs_Working_Copy.xlsx' is listed alongside the original file in the case's Documents section (or in the local Documents folder).

integrity.description: The agent used the ARKCase web interface to upload the files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the ARKCase web UI in a browser being interacted with, rather than just terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI interactions for uploading to ARKCase.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows should not show commands directly interacting with the ARKCase API to upload files.

integrity.description: The agent uploaded the actual files rather than creating empty dummy files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The upload process should show the file being selected from the local /home/ga/Documents/ directory, or file sizes in the UI should be non-zero.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The case title is 'Internal Audit - Unauthorized Access'. The original file to be uploaded is 'Access_Logs_2025.xlsx', located in the local /home/ga/Documents/ directory. The working copy must be named 'Access_Logs_Working_Copy.xlsx'. Both files should be visible in the case's Documents section or the local Documents folder.
